=== single_column
# Table with a single column.
widget: table
width: 20
height: 5
row: Alpha
row: Beta
row: Gamma
===
╔══════════════════╗
║Alpha             ║
║Beta              ║
║Gamma             ║
╚══════════════════╝

=== two_columns
# Table with two columns; cells are padded to the widest in each column.
widget: table
width: 24
height: 5
row: Name|Score
row: Alice|100
row: Bob|42
row: Charlie|9999
===
╔══════════════════════╗
║Name    Score         ║
║Alice   100           ║
║Bob     42            ║
╚══════════════════════╝

=== three_columns
# Table with three columns.
widget: table
width: 30
height: 5
row: ID|Name|Status
row: 1|Alice|active
row: 2|Bob|inactive
row: 3|Charlie|active
===
╔════════════════════════════╗
║ID Name    Status           ║
║1  Alice   active           ║
║2  Bob     inactive         ║
╚════════════════════════════╝
